form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation eighth of 11 at Saint-Cloud in the LR November 9 over 1400m, in the wet; 13 len behind Quiescent carrying 57kg at $15. At his first start won by 1.3 len Deauville All Weather October 23 over 1300m defeating Howitzer with 58kg at $6.10. Open to improvement this time in work and is worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation eighth of 11 at Saint-Cloud in the LR November 9 over 1400m, in the wet; 13 len behind Quiescent carrying 57kg at $15. At his first start won by 1.3 len Deauville All Weather October 23 over 1300m defeating Howitzer with 58kg at $6.10. Open to improvement this time in work and is worth including.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; won by 1.3 len at Lingfield All Weather March 25 over 1200m defeating Caviar Cowboy carrying 58.5kg at $2.50. Will take a lot from that run and is sure to play a big role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; won by 1.3 len at Lingfield All Weather March 25 over 1200m defeating Caviar Cowboy carrying 58.5kg at $2.50. Will take a lot from that run and is sure to play a big role.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning post a big 4 len win. Newmarket (July) July 10 over 1200m defeating Country Artiste with 58kg at $4.50. On debut third of 8 at Chelmsford June 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Coming Attraction carrying 58kg at $4.50. Well placed to pick up where she left off.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning post a big 4 len win. Newmarket (July) July 10 over 1200m defeating Country Artiste with 58kg at $4.50. On debut third of 8 at Chelmsford June 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Coming Attraction carrying 58kg at $4.50. Well placed to pick up where she left off.

form.formComment: First-starter by Al Kazeem out of Orapids. Watch for any market moves.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Al Kazeem out of Orapids. Watch for any market moves.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at Hamilton Park September 22 over 1200m, soft track; a head behind Passing Thought carrying 60.5kg at $7. On debut third of 10 at Carlisle September 1 over 1180m, 1.0 len behind Hardy's Hero carrying 59kg at $3.30. Must be respected on what we have seen to date.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(9). Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at Hamilton Park September 22 over 1200m, soft track; a head behind Passing Thought carrying 60.5kg at $7. On debut third of 10 at Carlisle September 1 over 1180m, 1.0 len behind Hardy's Hero carrying 59kg at $3.30. Must be respected on what we have seen to date.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Territories out of Thraya Star. Hard to recommend without a market push.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Blue Point out of Charlotte Rosina. Will pay to watch for a betting push.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, 9th of 11 at Chelmsford on March 26 over 1200m, 13 len behind Moscow Power with 58.5kg at $13. Last start 7th of 9 at Wolverhampton on March 30 over 1200m, 21 len behind Sovereign Spell carrying 58.5kg at $51. Others appeal more.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Territories out of Capla Berry. Pay to keep an eye on market moves.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation sixth of 9 at Doncaster November 8 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind I'll Be Back with 60.5kg at $81. On debut second last of 8 at Newbury October 24 over 1300m, soft track; 10 len behind Needle Match carrying 60.5kg at $29. Likely improver.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign third in a small field at Lingfield All Weather December 31 over 1200m, 4 len behind Cryingintherain with 60.5kg at $3. On debut fifth of 8 at Southwell All Weather December 12 over 1400m, 11 len behind Sanaam with 60.5kg at $7. Has ability and is sure to have come on over the break.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly by Dream Ahead out of Al Janadeirya having her first start. Must be kept safe.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old filly by Dream Ahead out of Al Janadeirya having her first start. Must be kept safe.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when ran last of 7 at Ayr on June 21 over 1200m, 15 len behind Do Bronxs carrying 58kg at $29. Hard to enthuse.
